message:
🌱 traefik: enable custom plugins/middlewares for Traefik (#1926)

* 🌱 Add traefik: enable custom plugins/middlewares for Traefik mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add traefik: enable custom plugins/middlewares for Traefik mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix traefik-1336 mission: replace raw discussion with plugin system docs

- Replace resolution with accurate Yaegi plugin system description
- Replace steps with plugin installation and usage instructions
- Sync fixes/ content to solutions/ (keeping missionClass different)
- Add code snippets for static config and middleware usage

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "traefik-1336-enable-custom-plugins-middlewares-for-traefik",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "traefik: enable custom plugins/middlewares for Traefik",
+    "description": "enable custom plugins/middlewares for Traefik. Requested by 128+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade to Traefik v2.3 or later",
+        "description": "Ensure you are running Traefik v2.3+, which introduced the Yaegi-based plugin system:\n```bash\ntraefik version\n```\nIf using Helm:\n```bash\nhelm upgrade traefik traefik/traefik --set image.tag=v2.10\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Browse the Traefik Plugin Catalog",
+        "description": "Visit the Traefik Plugin Catalog at https://plugins.traefik.io to find community and official plugins. Each plugin page shows installation instructions and configuration options."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Install a plugin via static configuration",
+        "description": "Add the plugin to your Traefik static configuration (traefik.yml):\n```yaml\nexperimental:\n  plugins:\n    my-plugin:\n      moduleName: github.com/traefik/plugindemo\n      version: v0.2.1\n```\nTraefik downloads and loads the plugin at startup using the Yaegi Go interpreter."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Use the plugin as middleware",
+        "description": "Reference the installed plugin as middleware in your dynamic configuration:\n```yaml\nhttp:\n  middlewares:\n    my-plugin-middleware:\n      plugin:\n        my-plugin:\n          headers:\n            X-Custom: \"value\"\n  routers:\n    my-router:\n      rule: \"Host(`example.com`)\"\n      middlewares:\n        - my-plugin-middleware\n      service: my-service\n```\nRestart Traefik and verify the middleware is active."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Traefik implemented a plugin system using Yaegi (an interpreted Go runtime) instead of compiled Go plugins. Starting with Traefik v2.3, users can install community plugins from the Traefik Plugin Catalog (https://plugins.traefik.io). Plugins are loaded at runtime without recompilation.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# traefik.yml - Install a plugin from the catalog\nexperimental:\n  plugins:\n    my-plugin:\n      moduleName: github.com/traefik/plugindemo\n      version: v0.2.1",
+        "# Use the plugin as middleware in a route\nhttp:\n  middlewares:\n    my-plugin-middleware:\n      plugin:\n        my-plugin:\n          headers:\n            X-Custom: \"value\"\n  routers:\n    my-router:\n      rule: \"Host(`example.com`)\"\n      middlewares:\n        - my-plugin-middleware\n      service: my-service"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "traefik",
+      "community",
+      "ingress",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "traefik"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/traefik/traefik/issues/1336",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/traefik/traefik"
+    },
+    "reactions": 128,
+    "comments": 59,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with traefik installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-02T06:57:36.168Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
